steps.title: Find the arc fraction
steps.content:
The arc has measure $45^\circ$, so it is this fraction of the whole circle:
$$\frac{45}{360}=\frac{1}{8}$$

steps.title: Scale to the circle
steps.content:
The $4$-inch arc is $\frac{1}{8}$ of the circumference, so the full circumference is $8$ times as long.
$$C=4\cdot8=32$$
The answer is D.
